data.content: Implementation review approved. Branch worktree-knots-b928-recent-terminal-hot at a1f055e3ad5b86fe80b0ac9ccde69f283e576991 matches the plan: terminal sync heads now use the 72h tier classifier, recent-terminal cold rows are detected/fixed by doctor, docs updated, and regressions cover sync, CLI list visibility, and doctor repair. Gates passed: make sanity 95.02% coverage and pre-push make sanity 95.02% coverage.
